Event: Magic Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 20/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM272
Web of Enchantment

Once in a while, the unit casts a shield upon self. The shield blocks 320000 damage of any type and exists up to 3 sec.

When any unit on the field is affected with the electrification or electrical pulse effects, the amulet's owner gains improved restoration.
The amulet's owner removes 3 random negative effects and restores 20% health, as well as having all their stats increased by 20% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Sage bot code: AM272

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
